description_for_human: Lets the agent read and write the user's tasks in the Tasks backend.
description_for_model: Performs CRUD operations against the user's personal task list. Use listTasks before completeTask so you can resolve a task title to its id.

functions.name: listTasks
functions.description: Returns every task that belongs to the signed-in user.

functions.name: createTask
functions.description: Creates a new task. Requires a title; due date is optional (ISO 8601 yyyy-mm-dd).

functions.name: completeTask
functions.description: Marks the task with the given id as completed.
